component.name: EpisodeItem
component.script: sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.thumb = m.top.findNode("thumb") m.epnum = m.top.findNode("epnum") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.airdate = m.top.findNode("airdate") m.desc = m.top.findNode("desc") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.title.text = c.title m.epnum.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 m.airdate.text = c.shortDescriptionLine1 if c.description <> invalid then m.desc.text = c.description else m.desc.text = "" end if if c.HDPosterUrl <> invalid and c.HDPosterUrl <> "" then m.thumb.uri = c.HDPosterUrl end if end sub sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.bg.color = "0x252525ff" m.title.color = "0xff2424ff" else m.bg.color = "0x141414ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" end if end sub
